purpose: Webpack module bundle with three modules: utils (date formatting, HTML sanitization, debounce), api (polling endpoint, template rendering), and app (debounced UI event loader that fetches events and renders them into DOM).

functions.name: formatDate
functions.purpose: Format JS Date to YYYY-MM-DD string

functions.name: sanitize
functions.purpose: HTML-escape special characters (<, >, &, ", ') to prevent XSS

functions.name: debounce
functions.purpose: Debounce function with setTimeout — delays execution until pause

functions.name: fetchEvents
functions.purpose: Fetch events from API for date range via GET

functions.name: renderEvent
functions.purpose: Render event as HTML div with sanitized title

security.issue: innerHTML usage - XSS vector if sanitize fails or is bypassed
Dynamic code execution via new Function() in string decoder
Anti-debugging evasion - detects DevTools via function.toString() regex
4-second setInterval polling - potential data exfiltration risk

dataFlow: DOM click → debounce(300ms) → fetchEvents(start, end) → GET /events → JSON response → forEach renderEvent → sanitize title → innerHTML → DOM
